sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n17798" key="au)toma/qeia" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">αὐτο-μάθεια</orth> [<foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">μᾰ], <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ἡ</gen>,</foreign> <sense id="n17798.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">self-teaching</tr_> or <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">learning,</tr_> <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Plu.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">2.973e</biblScope> </bibl>:—also <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">αὐτο-μᾰθία</orth>, <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Aristid.</author> </bibl> <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Quint.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">2.9</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
